objective: Settle the 40-versus-41 uncertainty by either a directly validated 40-block witness or a sound union closing the canonical 47-node exclusion frontier, followed by independent global coverage validation.
success_criterion: Either an independently validated 40-block cover, or 47/47 frontier nodes with valid closures across the portfolio and independent global coverage validation; no single exclusion method must close every node.

active_resolution_routes.success_certificate: 40 distinct 6-subsets directly checked to cover all 495 four-subsets, with the forced-matching and exact-degree assumptions independently audited
47/47 replayable node closures plus an independent canonical-partition coverage audit

first_measurement.instruction: Do not alter, interrupt, or reinterpret the fixed 20-leaf sequential-versus-kmtotalizer protocol. Preserve its original hypothesis and acceptance rule as a method comparison, not a campaign-wide stop gate.

ranking: complementarity on nodes left open by other methods
next_experiment_rule: After each bounded tranche, choose the experiment maximizing expected certified coverage of the currently unclosed frontier, not average closure rate over already tested nodes.
admission_gate: Every new formulation or search family must first pass a cheap semantic-equivalence check or direct-witness validation gate.
duplication_rule: Do not scale a variant that only duplicates closures obtained by a better method, except for explicitly assigned independent validation.

unsat: reconstructed CNF bound to an encoding revision and SHA-256
independent audit receipt with no semantic disagreement
sat: canonicalization receipt against the full catalog
